zh.lifeSummary: 當Jordon Macclesfield II於大約1310年出生在英國英格蘭爾馬可萊斯費爾德時，他的父親Jordon Macclesfield I41歲，母親Mrs. Jordon Macclesfield38歲。他和Lucy Macclesfield至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1356年在他的家鄉享年47歲。

nameMeanings.name: Macclesfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Maxfield
meanings: English: habitational name from Macclesfield in Cheshire. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Maccel (genitive Macceles) + Old English feld ‘open country’.

nameMeanings.name: Jordon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a name given to a child of either sex baptized in holy water that was, purportedly at least, brought from the River Jordan, whose Hebrew name, ha-yarden, means ‘flowing down’. It was in this river that Christ was baptized by John the Baptist, and medieval pilgrims to the Holy Land usually tried to bring back a flask of its water with them. The modern given name is either a revival of this, or else a transferred use of the surname that was derived from the medieval given name. It is more popular as a boy's name in Britain and as a girl's name in the United States.

It is more popular as a boy's name in Britain and as a girl's name in the United States.

en.lifeSummary: When Jordon Macclesfield II was born about 1310, in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Jordon Macclesfield I, was 41 and his mother, Mrs. Jordon Macclesfield, was 38. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Lucy Macclesfield. He died in 1356, in his hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jordon Macclesfield II est né environ 1310, à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Jordon Macclesfield I, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Jordon Macclesfield, avait 38 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Lucy Macclesfield. Il est décédé en 1356, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jordon Macclesfield II um 1310 in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jordon Macclesfield I 41 und seine Mutter Mrs. Jordon Macclesfield 38. Er hatte mit Lucy Macclesfield mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1356 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jordon Macclesfield II è nato il circa 1310 nel Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Jordon Macclesfield I, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Jordon Macclesfield, aveva 38 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Lucy Macclesfield. Morì nel 1356, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jordon Macclesfield IIが約1310年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールドで生まれた時，父Jordon Macclesfield Iは41歳，母Mrs. Jordon Macclesfieldは38歳であった。彼はLucy Macclesfieldとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1356年に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jordon Macclesfield II(이)가 대략 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 맥클스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jordon Macclesfield I(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Jordon Macclesfield(은)는 38세였다. 그는 Lucy Macclesfield(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1356년 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jordon Macclesfield II nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Jordon Macclesfield I, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Jordon Macclesfield, tinha 38 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Lucy Macclesfield. Ele faleceu em 1356, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jordon Macclesfield II родился около 1310 г. в местности макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Jordon Macclesfield I было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Jordon Macclesfield, 38. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Lucy Macclesfield. Он умер в 1356 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jordon Macclesfield II nació aproximadamente 1310, en Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Jordon Macclesfield I, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Mrs. Jordon Macclesfield, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Lucy Macclesfield. Murió en 1356, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años.
